events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — In a game neither team seemed eager to win, the Los Angeles Chargers relied on their defense — especially rookie cornerback Tarheeb Still — to hand Kirk Cousins and the Atlanta Falcons their third straight loss.
headlines.shortLinkText: Still makes 2 picks, returns one for TD as Chargers hand Falcons third straight loss, 17-13

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson has been at the center of a quarterback controversy since he arrived in Pittsburgh, competing with Justin Fields for the starting job.
headlines.shortLinkText: Russell Wilson throws for a season-high 414 yards and 3 TDs as the Steelers top the Bengals 44-38

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings were searching for an offensive rhythm well past halftime. Aaron Jones had another early turnover.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Anthony Richardson is getting used to having the ball in his hands in close games. And he's learning how to win in those situations.
headlines.shortLinkText: Richardson throws for TD and runs for 2 with 12 seconds left as Colts beat Patriots 25-24

events.name: Seattle Seahawks at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Leonard Williams was chugging along down the sideline with the end zone slowly getting closer.
headlines.shortLinkText: Williams' 92-yard INT return and Charbonnet's late TD run help Seahawks top Jets 26-21

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels wanted no part of sitting around for half of December dwelling on a losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayden Daniels has 4 TDs as the Commanders end their skid at 3 by beating the Titans 42-19

headlines.description: — The Houston Texans found some much-needed momentum — call it “Joe-mentum” — before their bye week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans find momentum heading into bye with 23-20 win at Jaguars after knocking out QB Lawrence

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Kryen Williams and the Los Angeles Rams strode to the locker room at halftime confident that the zero they had on the scoreboard was no indication of how the final 30 minutes would go.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford and Kyren Williams help the Rams grind out a 21-14 victory over the Saints

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — When Baker Mayfield felt Jadeveon Clowney step on the back of his right ankle in the third quarter, he feared he'd torn his Achilles tendon.
headlines.shortLinkText: McLaughlin's field goal in OT helps Bucs beat Panthers 26-23, move into 1st-place tie in NFC South

headlines.description: — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens

headlines.description: — Josh Allen’s memorable week began with singer and actress Hailey Steinfeld accepting his proposal for marriage and ended with the...
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Allen has TDs passing, rushing and receiving as Bills rout 49ers 35-10 in snow, clinch AFC East
